CREATE TABLE sales (id INT, amount DECIMAL(10,2));
CREATE TABLE returns (sale_id INT, amount DECIMAL(10,2));
SELECT AVG(s.amount - r.amount) FROM sales s LEFT JOIN returns r ON s.id = r.sale_id;
SELECT AVG(amount) FROM (SELECT amount FROM sales WHERE amount IS NOT NULL) AS valid_sales;
CREATE TABLE products (product_id INT, price DECIMAL(10,2));
SELECT AVG(p.price) FROM products p WHERE p.price > 10.00;
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INT, product_id INT, quantity INT);
SELECT AVG(o.quantity * p.price) FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id;
CREATE TABLE employees (id INT, salary DECIMAL(10,2));
SELECT AVG(salary) FROM employees WHERE salary IS NOT NULL;
SELECT AVG(amount) FROM sales WHERE amount BETWEEN 100.00 AND 300.00;
SELECT AVG( DISTINCT p.price) FROM products p;
SELECT AVG(c.total_revenue) FROM (SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_revenue FROM sales GROUP BY id) c;
